name: SEAL Human Authority Levels
principle: Every ecosystem entity has # identity. Only a human may grant, deny, approve, reject, change, pause or revoke SEAL. AI may only explain, suggest, compare, warn, simulate, prepare, route after approval and record the human decision.

levels.name: personal-choice
levels.authority: human permission for low-risk actions affecting the same #

levels.name: operational-permission
levels.authority: human permission for bounded, reversible and auditable execution

levels.name: consequential-approval
levels.authority: human approval for actions affecting money, rights, access, certification, status, records or another #

levels.name: constitutional-approval
levels.authority: authorized humans jointly approve structural, governance, sovereign, emergency or irreversible change

finalityRules: No action becomes final without explicit human SEAL, valid scope and proof.
Silence, inactivity, predicted preference, behavioral inference and AI recommendation never count as SEAL.
Delegated SEAL must originate from an authorized human and cannot exceed the issuer's authority.
AI and machines never hold independent SEAL authority.
Expired, revoked, challenged or out-of-scope SEAL cannot authorize final action.
SEAL 4 always requires multiple authorized humans.
